candidates.name: U²-Net
candidates.pros: Well-established, multiple sizes (U2Net/U2NetP), robust for general subjects, Apache 2.0 license.
candidates.cons: Older compared to DIS, but very stable.

candidates.name: BASNet
candidates.pros: Better edge definition than standard U2Net.

candidates.name: IS-Net (DIS)
candidates.pros: State-of-the-art performance, handles very high resolution.
candidates.cons: Heavier model, maybe overkill for patch selection.

candidates.name: OpenCV Saliency
candidates.cons: Poor performance on complex AVA-style photos (already failed in V2).
